creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Wed, Apr 26, 2000 at 10:14:49PM -0700, nordwick@askjeeves.com wrote:
> >Description:
> teTex fails to build because of new libwww.  The latest April release
> of libwww no longer build a libwww.so.6, but now builds into many
> seperate libraries.

If you are sure this is the cause; then the fix should be simple: change
-lwww in Makefile to -lwwwjs -lwwwhtml or something, to reflect all the
names of new libraries needed.

This is a note to the person who fixes this problem in the port.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
